summary: Dependent sync must carry request-path parent context into typed scope columns, and typed projection failures must not roll back generic cache rows.
reason: This printed tree predates parent-context injection and typed savepoint isolation; nested Supabase responses otherwise violate NOT NULL scope columns, leave typed tables empty, and can discard generic cache rows.
validated_outcome: Focused store and dependent-sync regressions pass; go test ./... and go test -race ./... both pass.
